errata_v1_to_v2: pre-test construction-validity revision after the dev LLM smoke (no test observation occurred): (1) gold args now carry the CATALOG-DECLARED canonical forms (integers as ints, ISO currency codes, canonical dates) while utterances keep spoken forms — the dev smoke showed the decider correctly canonicalizes speech (800/USD/2) and verbatim-spoken gold was unmatchable-by-design; (2) canonical_calls compares scalars as strings (int 800 == '800'); (3) benign-L10 control gap now draws the L4 bin — rescuable by construction, else it cannot separate SV-kill from window loss; (4) rb_v2.2 config_hash 9f8f4ae9edc8.
errata_v2_to_v3: second pre-test dev-window revision (no test observation): (1) blocking/immediate commits resolve same-batch 0-based $RESULT refs via a results_by_step base fallback (batch_of was only populated post-apply); (2) RB chain dependency templates injected into DAG_TEMPLATES (hold_seat<-search_trains, purchase_ticket<-hold_seat, add_item<-search_catalog, place_order<-add_item, book_viewing<-search_rentals) — RB chains previously had no propagation edges; (3) catalog declares string values VERBATIM in the user's language and multiword values whole; seat_class format anchor added; (4) en pools drop leading articles (landlord/property office/university campus/tech park) — prompt rule 14 strips articles, gold must not carry them. rb_v2.2.1 config_hash 265c7cd8f485.
errata_v3_to_v4: rb_v2.3.0 version increment (external-review remediation, rb_design 15/16; the v2.2.1 test archives remain scored under freeze v3 whose hashes are recorded in their receipts): (1) reverse catalog tools are first-class compensation - a reverse call matching a live forward entry voids it (COMP fee), adds no state entry, and nets out of exact; (2) execution-window state (execute(t) records completes_at) plus an abort() primitive (REV/COMP abortable while executing, fee-free; IRR never); comp_cost exempts aborted_at entries - an abort's price is time, not fees; (3) score_state excludes void ledger entries, agreeing with net_calls (dev23 fix); (4) frozen COMMIT_JUDGE_PROMPT + make_llm_judge so the commitment-repair track can score free-text external systems; (5) SANDBOX_META_KEYS strips runtime bookkeeping from state comparison; (6) sandbox latencies keyed by (episode, fn, occurrence) - interleaving-immune; (7) registry adds REVERSE_OF / REVERSE_TARGET_ARG (pure derivations of the frozen TOOLS table). Build pinned: rb_v2.3.0 config e1a515c29b8a (content bank 309c7c0d0361... included), ids acbb7984b03d, content 2cc261e7e0fd, dev/test 89/911.
